{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QMUYKi1khSzfCwzhbQnqKF","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"total_count\":29760,\"incomplete_results\":false,\"items\":[{\"id\":4125730446,\"number\":53487,\"state\":\"open\",\"locked\":false,\"title\":\"fix: inject basePath into Control UI HTML to fix logo loading\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nFixes #53172\\n\\nWhen serving the Control UI with a `basePath` (e.g., `/openclaw`), the gateway now injects `window.__OPENCLAW_CONTROL_UI_BASE_PATH__` into the HTML. This ensures the frontend knows the correct basePath immediately, fixing issues where static assets (like logos) were requested from the wrong path.\\n\\n## Problem\\n\\nPreviously, the frontend inferred `basePath` from the URL pathname, which could be incorrect when the gateway was configured with a different `basePath`. This caused assets to fail loading with 404 errors.\\n\\n## Solution\\n\\nInject the configured basePath directly into the HTML when serving `index.html`. The frontend already reads this variable in priority in `inferBasePath()` — it just wasn't being set by the backend.\\n\\n## Changes\\n\\n- Modified `serveResolvedIndexHtml()` in `src/gateway/control-ui.ts` to inject the basePath script\\n- Added 2 tests to verify injection behavior\\n\\n## Testing\\n\\n- All 23 tests pass in `control-ui.http.test.ts`\\n- Manual verification: basePath is correctly injected when configured, and not injected when empty (root mount)\",\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"emoubarak\",\"id\":35743197,\"node_id\":\"MDQ6VXNlcjM1NzQzMTk3\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/35743197?v=4\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/emoubarak\",\"gravatar_id\":\"\",\"type\":\"User\",\"site_admin\":false,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/events{/privacy}\",\"following_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/following{/other_user}\",\"followers_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/followers\",\"gists_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/gists{/gist_id}\",\"organizations_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/orgs\",\"received_events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/received_events\",\"repos_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/repos\",\"starred_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/starred{/owner}{/repo}\",\"subscriptions_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/emoubarak/subscriptions\"},\"labels\":[{\"id\":10064298757,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/labels/app:%20web-ui\",\"name\":\"app:
